title: Uncrafting
description: This data pack adds the possibility of uncrafting some blocks in the crafting table
body:
This datapack adds the possibility of uncrafting mossy blocks, slabs, wood in crafting table, and bamboo blocks, mossy block, wood in stonecutter. More blocks will be added in future versions. # How to import the datapack 📥 ## Within modrinth app Just click install and chose instalation. After that, datapack should be installed ## Without modrinth app **To import the datapack without modrinth app, unzip “Uncrafting.zip”, copy the “Uncrafting” folder and paste it into "%appdata%\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks"**
# Can I delete the datapack 🗑️ **Yes**, this data pack can be safely removed as it does not change the core mechanics of the game # How to delete data pack 🗑️ ## Within modrinth app Go to instalation settings, and just press "remove project" ## Without modrinth app Go to "%appdata%\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\\datapacks"** and delete "Uncrafting" folder.
